heading: Additional penalties for noncompliance
label: 689m Additional penalties for noncompliance
notes: References in TextFor definition of “this chapter”, referred to in subsec. (a), see References in Text note set out under .section 661 of this title

children.text: void the participation agreement between the Administrator and the company; and
cause the company to forfeit all of the rights and privileges derived by the company from this chapter.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Before the Administrator may cause a New Markets Venture Capital company to forfeit rights or privileges under subsection (a), a court of the United States of competent jurisdiction must find that the company committed a violation, or failed to comply, in a cause of action brought for that purpose in the district, territory, or other place subject to the jurisdiction of the United States, in which the principal office of the company is located.

children.heading: Parties authorized to file causes of action
children.label: 2 Parties authorized to file causes of action
children.text: Each cause of action brought by the United States under this subsection shall be brought by the Administrator or by the Attorney General.
